chunks.title: Jeroboam's Wife Visits Ahijah
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit covering the wife's journey, the prophecy, and the child's death.

chunks.title: Summary of Jeroboam's Reign
chunks.reason: Concludes the narrative of Jeroboam with historical summary and succession details.

chunks.reason: A continuous historical account detailing Rehoboam's reign, Judah's apostasy, and the Egyptian invasion.

chunks.title: Conclusion of Rehoboam's Reign
